summary: The diff implements most of the redesign requirements — REQ-1 through REQ-4 are well covered with updated components, CSS design tokens, and Tailwind config. REQ-5 is partially addressed: HeroSection.tsx references the generated image path, but no actual image file (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png or .jpg) appears to have been added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a rich, dark luxury hero background image featuring abstract gold and obsidian textures with a cinematic feel, to replace the current hero background. Image must be rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: No image file was added in the diff (Added: 0 files). HeroSection.tsx references '/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg' but the actual image asset is not present among added files.
